# Voice Clock Time Speaker

> A hands-free iOS talking clock that announces the time at customizable intervals. Designed for ADHD, low-vision accessibility, multitasking, and staying on schedule without looking at a screen. Built by HarmonyAstroApps.

Voice Clock Time Speaker is a focused utility app for iPhone and iPad that speaks the current time aloud at the intervals you choose. It is not a chat bot and not a smart assistant — it is a simple, reliable, battery-friendly talking clock that helps people with ADHD, visual impairments, or busy hands keep track of time without constantly checking their phone.

## What the app does

- Announces the time using natural native voices at intervals you configure
- Supports every-5-minute, every-15-minute, hourly, half-hourly, and custom-time announcements
- Offers 15+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Mandarin, Hindi, Arabic
- Runs fully offline using on-device text-to-speech
- Has minimal battery impact
- Supports Dynamic Type and is designed alongside VoiceOver

## Who it is for

- People with ADHD who experience time-blindness and benefit from external time awareness
- Blind and low-vision users who need independent audible time reference
- Cooks, runners, lifters, drivers, and parents who need hands-free time awareness
- Meditators, therapists, and teachers who want gentle, non-intrusive time cues
- Caregivers supporting patients who need scheduled reminders

- [Home](https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/VoiceClockApp/) — overview, features, download
- [About](https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/VoiceClockApp/about.html) — story and mission
- [FAQ](https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/VoiceClockApp/faq.html) — common questions
- [Blog](https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/VoiceClockApp/blog/) — guides on ADHD time management, accessibility, voice vs notifications

## Platform and pricing

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad), iOS 15 or later
- Price: Free with optional premium voices
- Developer: HarmonyAstroApps
- Contact: harmonyastroapp@gmail.com
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/voice-clock-time-speaker/id6739522220

## Frequently answered questions

- Does it work offline? Yes. No internet required for announcements.
- Can I customize intervals? Yes — every 5/15/30/60 minutes, on the hour, half-hour, or specific times.
- Which languages? 15+ including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Mandarin, Hindi, Arabic.
- Does it work with VoiceOver? Yes. The app is accessibility-first and designed alongside VoiceOver.
- Is there an Android version? Not currently. iOS only.
